questionHtml:
Gersmehl diagrams for two ecosystems are shown.

Deduce, with a reason, which ecosystem is representative of a tropical rainforest.
markschemeHtml:
a. ecosystem I 

b. low levels of litter due to high rates of decomposition
OR
high amounts of biomass related to high rates of productivity
OR
weathering/leaching due to high rates of precipitation

meta.title: Deduce, with a reason, which ecosystem is representative of a tropical rainforest.
breadcrumbLabels: Option C: Ecology and conservation (Core topics)
